title: Phantasmagoria
description: You download an innocent-looking modpack off Modrinth, but something isn't as it seems...
body:
![The logo of Phantasmagoria](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41612c1a2763f1aaf054c17cf19fd43aff343de5.png)
# Make it out alive. Make it out alive. Make it out alive.
**_Lore Concept:_** One player launches a Version of Minecraft from the Dark Web and is now met with their nightmare that they once called _Phantasmagoria._ Your only goal now is to to survive long enough to not spiral into insanity... Typical mods/features you would expect, but there are some that should have never ran on your computer.

<details>
<summary>Entities</summary>
  
- Nice try. Find them yourself

</details>

CREDITS:
- Insparation from Fear Nightfall - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/fear-nightfall
